summary: Event Summary Post-Tournament Control Center testing complete. All 6 features verified - 100% pass rate. Actions Needed Today, urgency labels, smart action hierarchy, school hints, Tournament Mode banner, and visual priority all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used existing event_1 data with 9 notes across 3 athletes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event Summary Post-Tournament Control Center testing complete (iteration 235). All 6 features verified: (1) Actions Needed Today section at top with 4 pending actions - PASS, (2) Urgency labels 'N urgent' (red flame) and 'N risk' (amber) in athlete headers - PASS (2 urgent badges, 1 risk badge found), (3) Smart action hierarchy with primary 'Send to Athlete' button highlighted in red - PASS, (4) School action hints 'Follow up within 24h', 'Monitor and engage', 'Low priority' - PASS (15 hints found), (5) Tournament Mode banner when 2+ pending actions - PASS, (6) Visual priority with red/amber left borders - PASS. Key test IDs: actions-needed, action-item-{i}, urgent-badge-{athleteId}, risk-badge-{athleteId}, tournament-mode-banner, school-hint-{noteId}, school-hint-bar-{schoolSlug}, send-to-athlete-{noteId}, sent-badge-{noteId}, complete-debrief-btn. Mobile responsiveness verified at 390px - all elements visible and properly laid out.
